prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 027
Filename: 027_awe.png
Purpose: Witnessing something unimaginably beautiful.
Success Criteria: Eyes brighten, breathing slows, wonder replaces thought.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Awe is luminous but quiet, with no glamour posing.
Review Focus: Reject if awe becomes fantasy styling, childlike wonder, beauty pose, theatrical uplift, or identity drift.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical awe reference. Wonder and brightness without losing Chloe identity.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
